вЂ‹ 

вЂ‹Standard Operating Procedure  

вЂ‹For Biological Safety Cabinet 

вЂ‹Thermo Fischer 1300 Series A2, Model 1375, Serial #152529-1374 

вЂ‹ 

вЂ‹ 

вЂ‹In the University of Maryland Greenebaum Comprehensive Cancer Center 

вЂ‹Flow Cytometry Shared Services, UMGCCC FCSS 

вЂ‹ 

вЂ‹ 

вЂ‹Bressler Research Building, Room BRB 7-010
